summary: The user sought assistance in marketing an E&M training workshop through social media posts, focusing on key topics such as the 2023 guidelines and the evolution of the E/M MDM table. The session included the creation of emotionally compelling teaser posts and responses to frequently asked questions to encourage potential trainees to register for the workshop.
facts: The user is marketing an E&M training workshop that covers topics including the 2023 guidelines, the history of the E/M MDM table, and hospital coding changes. The workshop will include practical applications related to ED coding and hospital observation and inpatient coding. The workshop is scheduled to last for 2 days. The user requested social media posts to promote the workshop in an emotional and convincing manner. The user emphasized the importance of addressing frequently asked questions to help potential trainees make informed decisions about attending the workshop.
